The '''KX-4 laser cannon turret''' was a [[Taim & Bak/Legends|Taim & Bak]] ball-mounted [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannon]]. [[Turbostorm-class gunship|''Turbostorm''-class gunships]] were equipped with two, for the port and starboard sides.

==Appearances==
*[[Shatterpoint (novel)|''Shatterpoint'']] {{Ab|Shatterpoint (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
*[[Shatterpoint (abridged audiobook)|''Shatterpoint'' abridged audiobook]]
